ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the data entry (e.g., 2008.03) */,
  "institutional_sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institutional sector of the data entry */,
  "descriptor" INTEGER /* Reference to the descriptor of the financial metric */,
  "sna08trans" INTEGER /* Reference to the SNA08 transaction code */,
  "asset_liability_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset or liability code */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the data entry */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the financial metric */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the data entry */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the data entry is effective */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* Source system or method of data collection */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level in the accuracy of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_asset_liability_code FOREIGN KEY ("asset_liability_code") REFERENCES asset_liabilities ("asset_liability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_descriptor FOREIGN KEY ("descriptor") REFERENCES descriptors ("descriptor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_sna08trans FOREIGN KEY ("sna08trans") REFERENCES sna08_transactions ("sna08trans_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_institutional_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("institutional_sector_id") REFERENCES institutional_sectors ("institutional_sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutional_sectors" (
  "institutional_sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institutional sector */,
  "institutional_sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the institutional sector */,
  "institutional_sector_code" INTEGER /* Code of the institutional sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent sector (if any) */,
  "sector_type" TEXT /* Type of the sector (e.g., Corporate, Government) */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Regulatory body responsible for the sector */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institutional_sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "descriptors" (
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each descriptor */,
  "descriptor_name" TEXT /* Name of the descriptor (e.g., Capital Account Opening balances) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the descriptor */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the descriptor (e.g., Capital, Revenue) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the descriptor */,
  "source_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the source of the descriptor */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the descriptor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("descriptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sna08_transactions" (
  "sna08trans_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SNA08 transaction */,
  "sna08trans_code" TEXT /* SNA08 transaction code (e.g., LS00000) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the SNA08 transaction */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction (e.g., Opening Balance, Closing Balance) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the transaction */,
  "source_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the source of the transaction */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sna08trans_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_liabilities" (
  "asset_liability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset or liability */,
  "asset_liability_code" TEXT /* Asset or liability code (e.g., AN10000) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset or liability */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the asset or liability (e.g., Non-Financial, Financial) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the asset or liability */,
  "source_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the source of the asset or liability */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the asset or liability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_liability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., REVISED) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the status (e.g., Revised, Preliminary) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the status */,
  "source_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the source of the status */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year of the data entry (e.g., 2008.03) */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  "calendar_year" TEXT /* Calendar year (e.g., 2023) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, policymaker, auditor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level or clearance of the user */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report in MB */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Annual, Quarterly) */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
